title: Live Measurement Event
description: Live v1 measurement event contract for handing live funnel signals to Ads Measurement without treating live comments or inbox as revenue.
$comment: Sources: PACK-08, TECH-08, PACK-07, and PACK-10. Live measurement handoff may feed funnel measurement, but official ROAS still depends on Verified Revenue. TODO: official live measurement event taxonomy is not locked.

channel_context_id.description: Channel context for the live signal.

event_type.description: Measurement event type. TODO: define official live measurement event enum.

funnel_event_id.description: Ads funnel event created from this signal.

verified_revenue_link_id.description: Verified revenue link if revenue was later verified.

raw_or_clean_status.description: Whether the event is raw or cleaned. TODO: define official raw/clean status values.

not_revenue_by_itself.description: Invariant: live signal is not verified revenue by itself.
